The [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] '''commuter gravsled''' was used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] used a gravsled to escape [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]].

{{Veh-stub}}
